title: Audiophile
description: A full-featured ecommerce platform for high-end audio enthusiasts with product listings, cart management, and a multi-step checkout flow.
impact: Seamless multi-step checkout with persistent cart state

title: Dictionary App
description: A dictionary web app with access to 150,000+ words, audio pronunciation guides, and a clean search UX built for language learners.

title: Countries App
description: A searchable global data browser letting users explore countries with detailed info — population, capital, currency, and bordering nations.

title: GitHub User Finder
description: A GitHub profile explorer that fetches user data and repositories in real time with a clean interface and instant search results.
impact: Live GitHub API integration with instant profile lookup
